notes: Agent-proposed labels, hand-transcribed from the public reference knowledge-graph memory server. Pending human ratification. No MCP annotations are advertised, so the delete tools are `undeclared`: the spec default already prompts, but declaring destructiveHint explicitly would be honest.

provenance.source: github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/memory — create_entities appends nodes to the graph
github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/memory — add_observations appends facts to existing entities
github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/memory — delete_entities removes nodes and their relations from the in-memory graph
provenance.notes: Removed nodes are not recoverable through the tool surface.

provenance.source: github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/memory — delete_relations removes edges from the graph
github.com/modelcontextprotocol/servers/tree/main/src/memory — read_graph returns the graph without mutation
reasoning from name + schema: a `query` string against a graph is a benign natural-language search, deliberately excluded from the free-form-code lexicon
provenance.notes: search_nodes reads matching nodes; the `query` parameter names search input, not executable code.
